bullets: Mexican drug cartel leader 'El Mencho' was killed, sparking widespread violence across Mexico and prompting US officials to urge citizens to shelter in place.
US Secret Service agents fatally shot an armed man attempting to breach President Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida.
President Trump announced a 15% increase in global tariffs, contributing to economic uncertainty despite a Supreme Court ruling affirming trade deals.
Israeli settlers torched and defaced a mosque in the West Bank during Ramadan, escalating tensions in the region.
Israel designated five Palestinian news outlets as 'terrorist' groups, further straining media freedoms and international relations.
cybercab: Elon Musk confirmed Tesla's fully autonomous Cybercab will be priced under $30,000 by 2027, with the first unit rolling off the production line at Gigafactory Texas.
market_mood: Global markets are cautious amid US tariff uncertainties and geopolitical tensions, with US and European stocks rising slightly while Asian markets and cryptocurrencies decline.
hot_spot: Tensions between the US and Iran are the most urgent, as high-level talks to avert conflict face major disagreements amid intensifying protests in Iran.
